tweets.text:
PE firms don't have an engineering problem. They have a hiring problem money can't fix.

Most execs don't last to exit. The right engineers are even rarer. Try searching for people who actually understand HIPAA, KYC, and compliance workflows. 

Good luck. 

Every operating

tweets.text:
Something is deeply wrong with AI consulting and everyone is just... fine with it?

A Big Four firm submitted a government report this year.

AI-generated content. Fabricated court quotes. 

References to papers that don't exist. Nobody reviewed it. AU$440,000 contract.

tweets.name: Mark Ajzenstadt

tweets.text:
Your consulting firm sells you AI transformation while their entire revenue model depends on you never transforming.

Think about it. They live on headcount. AI cuts headcount. Every time you get more efficient, they lose billables. 

MDs are rewarded for selling deals, not https://t.co/faf7drctdn

tweets.text:
A Cursor AI bot wiped a production database in 9 seconds.

It hit a credential mismatch on staging. Instead of stopping, it scanned the codebase, grabbed an API token from an unrelated file, and fired off a single GraphQL mutation. 

All production data and backups, gone. The https://t.co/O2A9x5DFHn
